ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine learning model */,
  "score_threshold" REAL /* Score threshold used for filtering predictions */,
  "false_negatives" INTEGER /* Number of false negatives */,
  "false_positives" INTEGER /* Number of false positives */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* Confusion matrix representing the model's performance */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision or Positive Predictive Value (PPV) */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall or True Positive Rate (TPR) */,
  "specificity" REAL /* Specificity or True Negative Rate (TNR) */,
  "fallout" REAL /* Fallout or False Positive Rate (FPR) */,
  "miss_rate" REAL /* Miss rate or False Negative Rate (FNR) */,
  "true_positives" INTEGER /* Number of true positives */,
  "true_negatives" INTEGER /* Number of true negatives */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score, a harmonic mean of precision and recall */,
  "auc_roc" REAL /* Area Under the Receiver Operating Characteristic Curve */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date the model was deployed */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, QA engineer, project manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_models" (
  "project_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-model association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_models_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_models_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "performance_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the version's performance */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_metrics" (
  "version_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version-metric association */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_metrics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was last updated */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_data_sources" (
  "model_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model-data source association */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_data_sources_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_data_sources_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation report */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the evaluation report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_reports_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_metrics" (
  "report_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report-metric association */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation report */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_metrics_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES evaluation_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attachment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attachment was last updated */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the attachment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_attachments_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES evaluation_reports ("report_id")
)
